mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(actual.actual_income), 0) as totalActualIncome, ifnull(sum(cost.paid_cost), 0) as totalPaidCost, ifnull(sum(cost.pending_cost), 0) as totalPendingCost, ( ifnull(sum(actual.actual_income), 0) - ifnull(sum(cost.paid_cost), 0) - #{reserveFund} ) as availableBalance, ( ifnull(sum(actual.actual_income), 0) - ifnull(sum(cost.paid_cost + cost.pending_cost), 0) ) as estimatedMonthlyProfit, ( select count(1) from ly_tour_cost c where c.status = 'PENDING' ) as pendingApprovalCount, ( select count(1) from ly_tour t2 left join ( select tour_id, sum(amount) as actual_income from ly_tour_income group by tour_id ) i2 on i2.tour_id = t2.tour_id where t2.status in ('ONGOING', 'READY') and date_sub(t2.depart_date, interval 3 day) <= curdate() and ifnull(i2.actual_income, 0) < (t2.group_size * t2.unit_price) ) as overdueFinalCount, ( select count(1) from ly_tour t3 left join ( select tour_id, sum(case when status = 'PAID' then amount else 0 end) as paid_cost, sum(case when status = 'PENDING' then amount else 0 end) as pending_cost from ly_tour_cost group by tour_id ) c3 on c3.tour_id = t3.tour_id where t3.status in ('ONGOING', 'READY') and ifnull(c3.paid_cost, 0) + ifnull(c3.pending_cost, 0) > t3.budget_limit ) as grossWarningCount from ly_tour t left join ( select tour_id, sum(amount) as actual_income from ly_tour_income group by tour_id ) actual on actual.tour_id = t.tour_id left join ( select tour_id, sum(case when status = 'PAID' then amount else 0 end) as paid_cost, sum(case when status = 'PENDING' then amount else 0 end) as pending_cost from ly_tour_cost group by tour_id ) cost on cost.tour_id = t.tour_id

select t.tour_id as tourId, t.tour_no as tourNo, t.tour_name as tourName, t.depart_date as departDate, concat(round(ifnull(income.actual_income, 0) / nullif((ifnull(cost.paid_cost, 0) + ifnull(cost.pending_cost, 0)), 0), 2), ':1') as incomeCostRatio, ifnull(income.actual_income, 0) - ifnull(cost.paid_cost, 0) - ifnull(cost.pending_cost, 0) as estimatedProfit from ly_tour t left join ( select tour_id, sum(amount) as actual_income from ly_tour_income group by tour_id ) income on income.tour_id = t.tour_id left join ( select tour_id, sum(case when status = 'PAID' then amount else 0 end) as paid_cost, sum(case when status = 'PENDING' then amount else 0 end) as pending_cost from ly_tour_cost group by tour_id ) cost on cost.tour_id = t.tour_id where t.status in ('ONGOING', 'READY') order by t.depart_date asc

select t.tour_id as tourId, t.tour_no as tourNo, t.tour_name as tourName, t.status as status, t.group_size as groupSize, t.unit_price as unitPrice, (t.group_size * t.unit_price) as totalReceivable, t.budget_limit as budgetLimit, t.sales_user_name as salesUserName from ly_tour t where t.tour_id = #{tourId}
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from ly_tour_cost where tour_id = #{tourId} and status = 'PAID'
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from ly_tour_cost where tour_id = #{tourId} and status = 'PENDING'

select c.cost_id as costId, c.occur_date as occurDate, t.tour_no as tourNo, c.category as category, c.amount as amount, c.status as status from ly_tour_cost c left join ly_tour t on t.tour_id = c.tour_id where c.advance_user_name = #{advanceUserName} order by c.occur_date desc, c.cost_id desc
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from ly_tour_cost where advance_user_name = #{advanceUserName} and status = 'PENDING'

select c.cost_id as costId, t.tour_no as tourNo, c.advance_user_name as advanceUserName, c.category as category, c.amount as amount, c.status as status, c.receipt_url as receiptUrl, c.occur_date as occurDate from ly_tour_cost c left join ly_tour t on t.tour_id = c.tour_id where c.payment_method = 'ADVANCE' and c.status = 'PENDING' order by c.occur_date asc, c.cost_id asc
mapper.update: update ly_tour_cost set status = #{status}, approval_remark = #{approvalRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where cost_id = #{costId}
mapper.select: select t.tour_id as tourId, t.tour_no as tourNo, t.tour_name as tourName, t.sales_user_name as salesUserName, t.customer_phone as customerPhone, t.depart_date as departDate, (t.group_size * t.unit_price) as totalReceivable, ifnull(i.actual_income, 0) as actualIncome, ((t.group_size * t.unit_price) - ifnull(i.actual_income, 0)) as finalReceivable from ly_tour t left join ( select tour_id, sum(amount) as actual_income from ly_tour_income group by tour_id ) i on i.tour_id = t.tour_id where t.status in ('READY', 'ONGOING') and date_sub(t.depart_date, interval 3 day) <= curdate() and ifnull(i.actual_income, 0) < (t.group_size * t.unit_price) order by t.depart_date asc
